findings.title: Final summary does not cover the required score progression
findings.detail: The proposal requires the autofix end summary to include both divergence warnings and score progression by round, but the design only defines `divergence_warnings[]` and the tasks only add warning displays. Add an explicit per-round score history structure (for example `round_results[]` or `score_history[]` with previous/current score per round) and corresponding tasks to populate and render it in both `specflow.review_apply.md` and `specflow.review_design.md`.
